PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Edward Bostock (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the only issue was the proof of the subscribing witness. Mr. Der stated that the proof was filed this morning and presented an endorsed copy to the Court. The petition was granted (an order for the same was signed in open court). The will is admitted as of this date.

Judge: David Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
